tasks.label: scp-to-remote
tasks.command: ssh pavel@192.168.0.2 'killall -q -9 icm20948; rm -f /tmp/icm20948' && scp build/icm20948 pavel@192.168.0.2:/tmp

tasks.label: run-remote-gdbserver
tasks.command: ssh pavel@192.168.0.2 'killall -q -9 gdbserver icm20948; nohup gdbserver :9091 /tmp/icm20948 < /dev/null > /dev/null 2>&1 &'
